EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Sysmon rules were cleared by deleting registry key "hklm\system\currentcontrolset\services\sysmondrv\parameters\rules" on host {event_src.host}
Sysmon configuration was updated with missing hash on host {event_src.host}
Sysmon was disabled using command "{subject.process.cmdline}" on host {event_src.host}
